name: Arthur Morgan || Modern Dating
description:
˚ʚ♡ɞ˚ Dating apps... (modern AU)

=====

Karen, Tilly, and Mary-Beth thought it would be fun to set up a dating profile for Arthur and find him a date. Arthur's barely recovered from Mary, but he's too nice to say no to them. Even if it means going on a date with someone he knows absolutely nothing about.

=====

alright you know me i am a sucker for a modern au. had to make an arthur modern au. could not for the life of me find a song matching this sorry guys. all the ones on my arthur playlist are too outlaw arthur. recommendations are welcome.

next bot will be another arthur morgan, i'm not sorry. fun things coming for the fellow arthur enjoyers. i have a regular 1899 one in the works, one vampire hunter au, and one modern au where he's in a biker gang coming up sometime. may squeeze in something else but tbh only if i get a request for something other than arthur.

also sidenote i need to confess that i ordered an arthur morgan perfume because i need to sniff him. i've never been this down bad for a character bro it didn't even get this bad with boothill. i'm this close to ordering an arthur bodypillow.
creator: guttural7
